text.title: Spec Writing Examples
text.summary: A search feature spec showing correct FR IDs, NFR with numeric criterion, and Given-When-Then acceptance criteria.

example.note: Compact spec with measurable goals, M/S/C priorities, numeric NFR, and testable acceptance criteria. Non-Goals is explicit with 3 items.
example.code:
# Product Search Specification Status: Draft | Owner: [PM Name]
## Overview Enable users to find products by keyword to reduce time-to-find from 3 min to 30 sec.
## Problem Users browse 500+ products manually. Average time to find: 3 minutes. 20% of support tickets are "can't find product."
## Goals | Metric | Current | Target | |--------|---------|--------| | Time to find product | 3 min | 30 sec | | "Can't find" support tickets | 20% | 4% |
## Non-Goals - Advanced faceted filters (separate feature, Q2) - AI-powered recommendations (no training data yet) - Voice search (no mobile-first requirement)
## User Stories US-1: As a customer, I want to search by product name so I can find it quickly. US-2: As a customer, I want to see autocomplete suggestions so I avoid typos.
## Functional Requirements | ID | Requirement | Priority | |----|-------------|----------| | FR-1 | Search bar visible on all pages | M | | FR-2 | Results appear as user types (debounced 300ms) | M | | FR-3 | Show top 10 results with product image and price | S | | FR-4 | "No results" state shows 3 similar products | C |
## Non-Functional Requirements | ID | Kind | Criterion | |----|------|-----------| | NFR-1 | Performance | Search results appear within 200ms at p95 | | NFR-2 | Accessibility | Search input has aria-label; results list uses role="listbox" |
## Acceptance Criteria FR-1: - Given I am on any page, when the page loads, then I see a search input in the header.
FR-2: - Given I type "chair" in the search input, when 300ms has elapsed, then results appear without submitting a form. - Given I type "chiar" (typo), when results appear, then I see "Did you mean: chair?" above the results.
